description: A satellite is at the end of its life. A mission controller must plan a final series of thruster burns to safely de-orbit it over the Pacific Ocean.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the required delta-v and burn sequence to lower the satellite's perigee into the Earth's atmosphere.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the precise timing and duration of the required burns.

nodes.task_description: Simulate the re-entry trajectory to ensure the debris footprint falls within the designated safe area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a simulation and confirms the debris will land in the South Pacific Ocean Uninhabited Area.

nodes.task_description: Generate the command sequence for the de-orbit burn and upload it to the satellite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the final command sequence and prepares it for upload.
